hooks.command: bash -c "branch=$(git -C "$PWD" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = 'main' ] || [ "$branch" = 'master' ]; then ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S); new_branch=\"feature/claude-${ts}\"; git -C "$PWD" checkout -b \"$new_branch\"; echo \"[KYC] Auto-created branch: $new_branch\"; fi"
